items.title: Podcast: Trump Sends More Tariff Letters; Nasdaq Climbs to Record
items.description: Elsewhere in financial markets, drugmaker Merck strikes a roughly $10 billion deal to buy Verona Pharma. The Justice Department’s criminal healthcare-fraud unit investigates UnitedHealth’s Medicare billing practices.
